dict.string: sourceApp == "/Applications/Discord.app" OR sourceApp == "/Applications/Lens.app" OR sourceApp == "/Applications/OrbStack.app" OR sourceApp == "/Applications/Slack.app" OR sourceApp == "/Applications/Twingate.app" OR sourceApp == "/Applications/Visual Studio Code.app" OR sourceApp == "/Applications/Warp.app" OR URL CONTAINS "github.com"
